ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's profile was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language for communication */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp of the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the address belongs */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP or postal code */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the address is the primary address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES user_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES user_addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product from the products table */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES user_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments regarding their experience */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order if the feedback is related to a specific order */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., email, website form) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES user_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "pref_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "pref_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has opted in for marketing communications */,
  "email_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of email communications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session originated */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for device and browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login attempt */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the account was locked out due to multiple failed attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription was made */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., newsletter, promotional) */,
  "unsubscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the user unsubscribed */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Current status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
